theScene: You knock on the wooden door, then wait......
At first, nothing seems to happen, but then, you can hear shuffling inside, along with the indistinct mumbling of someone who doesn't sound like they're in the best of moods...

Then there's a small click, and the door opens a crack, just enough to let through a large reptilian claw covered in very dark purple scales which wraps around the edge of the door as if to brace it in place.

With the seemingly pitch-black interior of the room making it hard to discern anything beyond the doorway, that one limb is all you can see of the apartment's resident... along with a single, pinkish-purple slitted eye which gazes up at you in obvious annoyance from a rather diminutive height while a feminine voice hushes out irately.
... Human, thou shalt know that neither puzzles nor clues are to be found in mine domain... Return to thine adventuring endeavors, and leave me be.
Despite unambiguously asking you to leave, the mysterious occupant does not shut the door on you nor move from her half-hidden position, seemingly waiting for you to move away first...

With a heavy sigh of defeated irritation at your return, the mystery woman slams the door open, revealing her shortstacked form to you with an alluring bounce of her prominent chest... along with a resounding crash as the moodily swung door thunderously hits the wall with a shake that sends bits of cracked paint floating down on you, the incensed gesture further abusing the innocent architecture.

Not seeming to have the slightest regard for any of that, however, the diminutive lady gazes up at you coldly, and you only get a moment to peek above her into the dark depths of her curio-filled room before her imperious voice draws your attention back to her.

Heed mine words, cur: {b}I{/b} am Malicia Sinistra, {b}I{/b} am the most powerful shadow dragon across the entire world, {b}I{/b} do not have the time to play nanny for some lost and annoying adventurer! {i}Prithee leave me alone.{/i}

She fulminates sternly, an almost tangible feeling of simmering fury oozing from her words as she glares up at you sharply... before closing her eyes and taking a moment to inhale and exhale, making her ample bosom heave eye-catchingly and her strained expression relax ever so slightly as she opens her eyes back to give you a less severe stare of annoyance, using one of her claws to idly toy with a lock of her silvery hair as she adds.

... {i}Nevertheless{/i}, magnanimous as I am, if 'twould make thee depart faster, I shall {i}graciously{/i} answer any pressing questions of thine... but do mind that I am {i}not{/i} here for passing conversation.

There is an accusatory scoff at the end of her sentence as she looks at you silently and sullenly... though somehow not altogether so hostilely as her previous claims would suggest, a glint of bemused interest showing in her gaze as she awaits what you have to say.

With a heavy sigh of annoyance, she briskly swings the door open to gaze up at you coldly, revealing her shortstacked draconic glory to you and her darkened domain behind her, only giving you a moment to peek at the shadowed curios and treasures within her domain before her demanding voice draws your attention back to her with a tetchy huff.
She leers up at you with pointed disinterest, crossing both of her imposing draconic claws under her bust and tapping her heel on the ground impatiently as she waits for you to speak.
Why are you talking like that?
... Are you sure this isn't related to the Sigil Hunt?
Why haven't you shut the door yet?
As you step away, the darkness-shrouded woman lets out a sigh of relief and quietly clicks the door shut before shuffling back into the apartment, leaving you alone in the hallway once more.
music/Emotional/Purple Planet Music - Emotional - Spiritual Moment (1_32) 90bpm (L).mp3
That is {i}none{/i} of thy business, human.

The unidentified feminine figure hisses irritably while her single eye narrows at you in annoyance, clearly stressing her desire to be left alone... But for some reason, she has yet to slam the door in your face.

EventText.NameOfScene: Why are you talking like that?
theScene: The unknown speaker clicks her tongue in deeply steeped annoyance before abruptly shutting the door with a slam that makes the frame quiver and a slight shake rumble through the walls... Looks like she didn't appreciate that.
music/Emotional/Purple Planet Music - Emotional - Spiritual Moment (1_32) 90bpm (L).mp3

The concealed woman answers sharply and flatly back at your inquiry, the even stare of her glowing eye visibly matching her tone... Yet, you also can't help but notice that she hasn't closed the door on you either.
Why are you talking like that?

EventText.NameOfScene: ... Are you sure this isn't related to the Sigil Hunt?
theScene: She lets out an emphatic, utterly exhausted sigh at the question, and you can see her one visible eye flatten as she leers hostilely at you.
{i}Yes, quite sure.{/i} Whatever clue thou mistakenly followedst to mine abode, 'tis not where thou shalt find the answers thou seekest.

If thou art still stuck on the first puzzle, direct thine inquiries to the mail boxes... And if thou art occupied with this floor's puzzle, know that the one who points at mine abode is one of the liars.
With such knowledge in hand, {i}surely{/i} thou canst find thy way without needing to further accost unrelated residents?
There is a slight bit of smug venom in her voice as she continues to stare at you with silent intent, seemingly still waiting for you to leave...

EventText.NameOfScene: Why haven't you shut the door yet?
theScene: 'Twould be rude? While I desire to be left alone, thou art still deserving of a {i}modicum{/i} of courtesy.

She answers with half-disinterested haughtiness that still has an edge of prim pride to it, meanwhile the single pink-purple eye that's been thus far peering at you is joined by a second one as its owner tilts her head to the side in order to gaze out of the door crack with both of them, as if to inspect you better, though the ambient shadows still utterly shroud her face from you as she pensively squints and muses.
Hm... Thinking of it, 'tis a rare thing for a human not to simply barge into mine haven... Hmhm...

She seems to contemplate something for a long moment of staring up and down at you, leaving you waiting with some perplexity until she speaks up again with a hint of excitement, an eager smile suddenly audible in her voice.
Very well! Thy lucky star shines upon thou on this day, human. If thou canst answer mine riddle, I shall grant you the {i}privilege{/i} of an audience with mine greatness.

Without bothering to wait for your agreement to this rather one-sided proposal, she begins speaking in a tongue that... you have absolutely {i}never{/i} heard before, the exotic verbiage leaving you staring dumbstruck at her as she keeps rattling on, then conclusively stares at you with an expectant gleam in her eyes once she's done, a few awkward seconds ticking by as you return her gaze in befuddled silence until she glances off in thought.
Ah... P-Perhaps a riddle that only makes sense in High Delusian {i}might{/i} be a few layers too deep... It {i}hath{/i} not been spoken for the better part of a millenium, after all... Hrm...
Again, she pauses, her large clawed hand tapping on the wooden door in reflection, until she seems to reach a decision and clears her throat to declaim.

{i}Mine shadows intertwine against the divine
destroying holy order to make it mine.
All shall kneel to splendor sublime
in mine transcending paradigm...{/i}
What be I?
Do we really need to do a riddle-?

EventText.NameOfScene: Do we really need to do a riddle-?
theScene: Your beseeching query is answered by a smug chuckle on the other side of the door, and you could easily imagine the diminutive woman thrusting out her chest while proudly crossing her arms if one of them wasn't currently busy.
Uhuhu.~ {i}Naturally.{/i} Humans must earn their rewards.♪
Uhuhu.~ Nay... But all the same, rejoice, for I shall accept thy clumsy answer regardless, as a token of magnanimous amusement towards thine entertaining display of flattery.♪
{i}Hahh?!{/i} The Umbral Coven whelp that this posse of cauldron-stirring conjurors of cheap tricks put in charge of the Labyrinth?! Is thou mind ailed???

Her inveighing indignation catches you off-guard, making you recoil slightly from the quaking door in fear of some form of retaliation... before relaxing as the shaking abates and she relents with a heavy sigh followed by a moody mumble.
Phooey... Well, mayhaps that riddle {i}still{/i} was too complicated for a neophyte... In which case, let us just skip it altogether...
Hmmm... An altogether not ill-advised guess... but an incorrect one nonetheless, I fear.~
In contrast to her previous disinterested tone, her voice is now a happy singsong as she continues rather primly.
But for thy good fortune, I shall find it in mine heart to take mercy on thee and deem thy fumbling attempt sufficient. Be glad.~
Ha ha.~ Such a facile answer... and a {i}far{/i} too uninspiredly generic one, I'm afraid. A {i}genuine{/i} scholar would have instead named {i}which{/i} specific Demon Queen, uhuhu.~
She hums cheerfully, watching your reaction through the doorway with undisguised superiority, before continuing in an almost honeyed voice.
But to reward thy token effort, I shall all the same deem thy simple answer sufficient... Though {i}barely{/i} so.

Mulling the enigma over, you actually remember a similar phrase from your adventurer studies... except that your unseen riddler omitted the first half of the quote, and some of the words are pointedly different... and the second half wasn't part of the original text at all, nor was it formulated as a riddle, since it's actually from a chronicle dating back six millenia, and so mostly lost to time...
As you explain your confusion and do your best to formulate an answer based on what knowledge you can muster, the mysterious woman's stance and eyes liven up rather excitedly.
Oh my, how exquisite! {i}Well-answered{/i} indeed.~ Thou must be exceptionally well-learned to see through mine clever and cruel deception.~ Aufuhu.~
She certainly sounds pleased as punch by that... but also seemingly equally keen on not providing the actual answer to the riddle... assuming there even was one.
And now... Another riddle! But {i}just{/i} one, on mine honor. A simple one, for the sake of mine entertainment.~
She says with an audible air of confident authority that sends a shiver down your spine, the hidden woman this time very clearly referring to herself.
Her darkness-wreathed gaze flattens in obvious disappointment, and she lets out a reprimanding sigh before dryly answering.
Feh, thou art a fool who sees no further than the tip of thy nose... Allow me to enlighten you.
The shadow-covered woman actually stays silent for a brief moment, tilting her head with a curious hum at your answer.
That is... woefully incorrect. But I shall concede thou hadst an interesting guess... And now, behold!
The eyes gazing at you merrily close while their owner lets out a giggle of indulgent amusement.
'Tis not the first time I have been on the receiving end of such a comparison, huhuhu.~
... But sadly for thee, I am no sphinx.
The woman behind the door seems to freeze in surprise at your answer, then lets out a thoughtful sigh.
Zounds... Perhaps this demesne holds too many clues...
Thou art correct, but thou shalt also know there is even more to mineself.~
The woman sputters a bit as you unpromptedly derail her mystic riddle vibes, before giving you a withering glare that poorly conceals a hint of a blush.

I-I- {i}Yes{/i}, I am that, and many other things: cute, sexy, powerful, wealthy, intelligent, perceptive, strong, knowledgeable... But lest thou turn mine riddle into a charade, permit me to stop thou and cut to the chase...

With her large claw still clinging to the door's edge, the diminutive woman suddenly swings it inward, letting the light of the hallway spill into the clearly very dark, gloomy room behind her, and suddenly reveal her silhouette while she exclaims with rather boisterous energy.

{b}I{/b} am Malicia Sinistra, Devourer of the Light, Holder of a Thousand Secrets, Undefeated in Battle, Veteran Treasure Hunter, Riddler Extraordinaire, and {size=-15}second{/size} most influential dragon in all of Lucidia!
... And {i}thou{/i} hast managed to earn mine curiosity. Well done, human.♪

The dragoness stands proudly before you in all her shortstacked glory, giving one of her ornate locks of hair a lazy twirl with an impressive dragon claw as she eyes you up thoughtfully in the now open light.
Thou art, by the by, free to bow, clap, prostrate thyself, or otherwise praise me as thou seest fit.~
But before we get to such obeisances, prithee tell me of thine own name, that I may know what to call mine guest.

Seeing no reason not to do so, considering that she {i}is{/i} welcoming you into her home, regardless of her {i}quirky{/i} character, you give her your name, which she receives with a gracious nod before proudly exclaiming.

Very well! Then, Human Adventurer [ThePlayerName], I shall now formally receive you in mine chambers. A proper audience cannot take place in a doorway, after all... Therefore, thou shalt enter mine domain, so we may exchange to our heart's content.

Then, without warning, and with a forwardness that starkly contrasts with her previously reclusive attitude, she suddenly reaches out and grabs you by the wrist with a clawed hand, then starts leading you into the darkened room without waiting for your answer, seeming to have all but forgotten about her aforementioned 'obeisances'.

Under the surprise of her wrenching motion, you stumble forward and follow after her without resistance, though you also can't help but feel like whatever effort you could have mustered against her spirited tugging wouldn't have achieved much, her assertive pull making you feel like you're in the clutches of something thousands of times her size, almost like you're a doll!

Before you can even get a word in edgewise, you're dragged into the shrouded interior and your host shuts the door behind you, plunging the room back into pure darkness and leaving you momentarily at a loss from the sudden lack of lighting.

Then, slowly, the place brightens with an ambient and rather dramatic glow radiating from stone carvings dotted about the premises, giving the chamber an otherworldly vibe as the apartment interior gradually reveals itself to you.

Even with the magical lights on, however, the room remains {i}very{/i} dark, cast in an eerie, downright abnormal gloom that barely lets you see an assortment of tables laden with odd stone antiques, strange trinkets, and a number of miniature buildings whose architecture mostly eludes you, the peculiar trove so abundant that it has spilled out onto the floor in places, and has ended up rather messily tucked under some of the many tables.
Noticing your gaze, Malicia lets out a somewhat awkward little cough, nervously fiddling with her hair for an instant, but then quickly recovering her self-assurance as she volunteers with a huff.

... Apologies for the mess and the rather {i}lowly{/i} standards of mine haven in these lands... Were we in mine home proper, I would have hosted thou in mine glorious castle, with countless of mine trophies and wonders for you to marvel at, and with mine impeccable staff to ensure thy comfort... I can assure thee that I hold no love for these cramped accommodations either...

And with that, she relinquishes your arm... but doesn't let you go entirely yet, instead picking you up to sit you down onto a stack of stone slabs with a cushion on top, the bizarre arrangement acting as a makeshift chair within the mess of a room.

Meanwhile, she daintily hops backwards to seat herself on the edge of a rather luxurious bed tucked into a corner, inadvertently giving you a front-row seat to the view of her heavy breasts wobbling in their tight confines as she primly settles herself before fixing you with a curious stare, wordlessly inviting you to speak.
The handle turns with a slightly reluctant rattle in your hand, almost like it's broken, but it does open without much resistance and the door easily swings ajar...

Revealing a {i}very{/i} dark room with pitch-black blinds covering the windows, casting the apartment in a gloomy darkness that barely lets you see an assortment of tables laden with odd stone antiques, strange trinkets, and a number of miniature buildings whose architecture mostly eludes you, the peculiar trove so abundant that it has spilled out onto the floor in places, and has ended up rather messily tucked under some of the many tables.

You're not sure whether you've stepped into some kind of storeroom or a bizarre hoarder's lair, but as you take a step in to get a better view of the curious collection as well as to try and get your eyes to adjust to the lack of lighting, the movement of a silhouette rising from a bed off to the side catches your gaze, allowing you to confirm that the place does seem to be lived-in!

Letting out a growl-like grumble, the clearly irritated occupant hops off their resting place and marches over with an imperiously striding gait, the light from the hallway gradually illuminating their curves while their voice rises in indignation.

Who {i}dareth{/i} enter the haven of Malicia Sinistra without announcing themself!? Have proper manners and security both sunk so low that everyone can keep waltzing into mine chambers as they please!? Confound this wretched, {b}thrice-useless{/b} door lock-!

Hissing with outraged frustration, the woman authoritatively brushes your hand aside to grab at the doorknob and angrily rattle it, visibly trying to realign the locking mechanism... But if anything, it is apparent that her large, powerful claws are only making things worse, her irate attempt only ending up disjointing and mangling the hapless mechanism a little more.

Ultimately letting out a huff of surrender at her fruitless endeavor, the small woman eventually relents and relinquishes the handle from her grasp, giving it one last condemning stare before turning her gaze to you with a mix of boredom and annoyance, the abrupt pivoting movement noticeably making her heavy breasts sway in their tight confines in a way that she yet pays little mind to as she addresses you.
...Why dost thou still linger, intrusive human? Know that mine domain is not part of this... 'stamp hunt'. Begone.
She punctuates the last word with a dismissive flick of a large clawed hand while she looks aside in drowsy exasperation, clearly expecting you to make yourself scarce without delay.
Who {i}dareth{/i} enter the haven of Malicia Sinistra without announcing themself-!? {i}Thee again-?!{/i}
Recognizing you with a glance and with no small amount of displeasure, she throws both her claws up in exasperation, clearly more than a little annoyed to see you barging into her home again.
{i}By Cerberus' serpentine tail, thou could learn to knock!{/i} {size=-10}Accursed useless door lock...{/size}
Malicia accusatorily leers at the battered handle before taking a moment to rub her face with a claw, letting out a heavy sigh of resignation as she huffs out.
{i}Ugh-{/i} Just ask thy questions and begone...

Who {i}dareth{/i} enter the haven of Malicia Sinistra without announcing themself-!? {i}Thee-?!{/i} Didst thou forget how to knock-?! Have proper manners and security both sunk so low that everyone can keep waltzing into mine chambers as they please!? Confound this wretched, {b}thrice-useless{/b} door lock-!

Hissing with outraged frustration, the woman authoritatively brushes your hand aside to grab at the doorknob and angrily rattle it, visibly trying to realign the locking mechanism... But if anything, it is apparent that her large, powerful claws are only making things worse, her irate attempt only ending up disjointing and mangling the hapless mechanism a little more.

Ultimately letting out a huff of surrender at her fruitless endeavor, the small woman eventually relents and relinquishes the handle from her grasp, giving it one last condemning stare before turning her gaze to you with a mix of boredom and annoyance, the abrupt pivoting movement noticeably making her heavy breasts sway in their tight confines in a way that she yet pays little mind to as she addresses you.
...Why dost thou still linger, intrusive and aggravating human? I have already told thee that mine domain is not part of this... 'stamp hunt'. Prithee begone.
She punctuates the last word with a dismissive flick of a large clawed hand while she looks aside in drowsy exasperation, clearly expecting you to make yourself scarce without delay.

With a heavy sigh, she swings the door open to gaze up at you coldly, revealing her shortstacked draconic glory to you and her darkened domain behind her, only giving you a moment to peek at the shadowed curios and treasures within her domain before her pensive voice draws your attention back to her.

With a heavy sigh of defeated exasperation at your persistent return, the mystery woman poisedly opens the door, revealing her alluring shortstacked form to you, and only giving you a moment to peer into the darkened depths of the curio-filled room behind her before she speaks in an attention-grabbing, yet restrainedly imperious tone, her eyes gazing up at you coolly as she regally declaims.
Thou art likely still unaware due to thy lack of proper manners, but I am Malicia Sinistra. A dragon {i}far{/i} above the likes of thee in status... and while I would prefer to be left alone...
Her gaze bores into you with a thoughtful curiosity offset by an amount of pointedly disdainful disinterest in her eyes as she looks you over before carrying on.
Who {i}dareth{/i} enter the haven of Malicia Sinistra without announcing themself!? {i}Thee again-!?{/i} Thou meddlesome rapscallion, thou-
Who {i}dareth{/i} enter the haven of Malicia Sinistra without announcing themself!? {i}Thee again-!?{/i} Thou meddlesome rapscallion, thou-
Who {i}dareth{/i} enter the haven of Malicia Sinistra without announcing themself!? Thou meddlesome rapscallion, thou-

Her sputtering, hissing diatribe of outraged frustration rapidly fizzles away to sudden pensiveness as she steps closer and gazes up at you in thought, as if she had just realized or remembered something as she figuratively bites her tongue, then starts over in a more restrained tone of voice.
Thou hast returned. What dost thou want? Hast thou reconsidered mine offer?
She stares up at you expectantly and curiously, albeit with still an edge of annoyance at your return.

Hm... I have heard thou hast managed to achieve thy goal here, and to secure the starlit stamp... So why thou wouldst persist in pestering mine person in such a fashion, the reason eludes me... Perchance this might be owed to some inkling of enlightened interest in the quality of mine august company... or perhaps simply to the effect of degenerate lechery towards mine alluring charms...

Hm... I have heard thou hast managed to achieve thy goal here, and to secure the starlit stamp... So why thou wouldst persist in pestering mine person in such a fashion, the reason eludes me... Perchance this might be owed to some inkling of enlightened interest in the quality of mine august company... or perhaps simply to the effect of degenerate lechery towards mine alluring charms...

Hm... I have heard thou hast managed to achieve thy goal here, and to secure the starlit stamp... So why thou wouldst persist in exploring... the reason eludes me... Perchance this might be owed to some inkling of enlightened interest... or perhaps simply to the effect of degenerate lechery...

Exhaling a self-satisfied scoff, she then takes a moment to close her eyes and thoughtfully sniff the air, before opening them again to give you a flat gaze while her nose wrinkles as if she'd just smelled some foul odor, her voice oozing with contempt as she goes on to accusatorily say.
Thou also hast {i}Eliza's{/i} scent about thee, no doubt as a result of her overbearing ceremony.

The diminutive woman lets out a hefty, chest-rising sigh and crosses both her clawed arms under her bountiful bust as she scans you critically, a glint of reluctant interest showing in her amethyst eyes when she adds with studied nonchalance.

This place's paltry excuses for puzzles and trials may be no more than a trifle for whoever hath two thoughts to rub together... but a success is a success. And, if {i}she{/i} hath displayed an interest in thee, then I must at least entertain a passing courtesy towards thee as well.

She exclaims with obvious pride and confidence, slowly letting her arms slip away from their defensive stance, one claw rising to idly toy with a lock of her curled hair while the other is held upright in front of her to demand your attention as she singsongs.

Thou must show thine {i}own{/i} interest as well.♪ I am {i}far{/i} less easy to please than that brazen strumpet, after all, so if thou wantest a proper audience with mineself, thou must offer {i}tribute{/i}.
She pronounces the last word with obvious relish as she holds out a clawed hand and puffs up, her ample bust rising showily while her smile stretches into a vainglorious grin.
Gift unto me a suitable relic or precious curio to add to mine collection, and thou shalt have the privilege of mine company proper.♪
Oh? Hast thou changed thy mind and decided to offer me proper tribute?
She pronounces the last word with obvious relish as she holds out a clawed hand and puffs up, her ample bust rising showily while her smile stretches into a vainglorious grin.
As before, gift unto me a suitable relic or precious curio to add to mine collection, and thou shalt have the privilege of mine company proper.♪
'Why would I want to do that?'
Her expression shifts to disappointed disinterest and she dismissively flicks a claw in your direction, like a noblewoman sending away an undeserving suitor.
{i}Feh.{/i} Then our business is done, is it not?
By all means, take thy time. Exchanges are not to be made lightly.
As you're about to give Malicia your tribute, you remember that it's currently attuned to your Grimoire, which she also seems to realize with a pout.
Erm... Thou shalt need to unequip the item first.

EventText.NameOfScene: 'Why would I want to do that?'
theScene: She starts indignantly as if she's about to break into an outraged tirade on the matter, but instead stops herself and lets out an exasperated pouty sigh, cloaking herself in affronted dignity.
{i}Hmph.{/i} I cannot help but feel that it should go without saying, but for thine edification, I shall elaborate.
Taking a proud pose with a claw regally laid against her chest in a way that doesn't make her look taller, but {i}does{/i} accentuate the prominent heft of her sizable bosom, she smugly proclaims.

{b}I{/b} am Malicia Sinistra, one of the most powerful and influential dragons in the {i}entire world{/i}. Merely having the {i}privilege{/i} of an audience with mineself is a {i}grand honor{/i}, one that crowned heads, vaunted heroes, and immortal archmages would vie to secure.

I shall further clarify that, pending that requested token of proper obeisance, thou shalt be allotted further audiences with mine exceptional person, which I shall graciously ensure to make good on, freeing the required time in mine busy schedule. Let no one say that Malicia Sinistra is a cheapskate.♪
She then pauses and stares at you for a thoughtful moment, before adding flatly.
... I shall even further clarify that the gift of a mere trinket shall not entitle you to mine intimate attentions. This is an audience offer, not a mating call.
I... Art thou mocking me, or art thou a complete dolt?

As she glares at you, you remember what she previously said about Eliza's smell and how she called her a 'brazen strumpet', making you realize that in retrospect, offering her something that has the dragoness written all over it was kind of a poor choice.

She starts with an emphatic guffaw at your claim before blinking in surprise as you take out your prize, the dragon's incredulity rapidly melting into overt curiosity as she immediately swallows her words and almost meekly muses.

She then looks at the small item with clear want in her gaze, one of her hands twitching as if in temptation to grab hold of it, before she shakes her head and gives you a stare clearly infused with concern.

While I {i}am{/i} impressed at such a unique and significant artifact, and at thine ability to acquire it... and while I {i}am{/i} flattered at thine offer, I hope thou understandest the worth of such a relic, and would not {i}actually{/i} be willing to so foolishly trade it away.

'Twould verily be a wonderful addition to mine collection, but Malicia Sinistra is no scoundrel. I shall therefore reiterate mine refusal, as well as mine encouragement not to part with such an object without due cause.
With that out of the way... Dost thou have anything else to offer?
The dragoness lets out a little 'Oh.' of curiosity at the sight of the luridly glittering crown, looking at it this way and that with an expert gaze before nodding in approval.

An interesting curio indeed... It exudes quite the unique and dangerous aura of demonic energy, and its creation is clearly recent, too. 'Twas not forged through normal methods either... Where did thou even procure such a trinket?
Not waiting for you to answer, she gives a little shrug, not actually seeming to care that much, and adding with a smile.
No matter. I shall gladly add it to mine hoard and study it in depth... shouldst thou be definitely willing to part with it?
Malicia stares at the rune for a long moment of obvious curiosity, idly following the ghost-given object's complex patterns with a claw for a moment, before warmly smiling at you.
Uhuhu, 'tis a simple bauble of no historical value, yet it fits mine tastes rather suitably. Quite the clever pick, which I shall accept.♪
... Shouldst thou be positively willing to part with it, of course.
Oho? What have we here? A historic item lost to Stingy Sofia's dusty trove of treasures?
She taps on the item with one claw in thoughtful appraisal, then conclusively nods.
That shall suffice... assuming thou art truly willing to part with it?
... Also prithee do not tell her I called her 'Stingy Sofia'.
Oho? What have we here? A historic item lost to Stingy Sofia's dusty trove of treasures?
She taps on the item with one claw in thoughtful appraisal, then conclusively nods.
That shall suffice... assuming thou art truly willing to part with it?
... Also prithee do not tell her I called her 'Stingy Sofia'.
Give Mali the Lucky Pocket Watch.

Give Mali the Ring of Kings.

EventText.NameOfScene: Give Mali the Ring of Kings.

theScene: Malicia happily takes the item from you into her claws and steps into her room, looking over her many relics and curios before seemingly finding the perfect spot for her new acquisition and setting it gently into place, before turning back to you with a cheerful smile.
And with that, our deal is struck, and thou hast earned mine attention proper.
Accordingly, a proper reintroduction is in order.♪

{b}I{/b} am Malicia Sinistra, Devourer of the Light, Holder of a Thousand Secrets, Undefeated in Battle, Veteran Treasure Hunter, Riddler Extraordinaire, and {size=-15}second{/size} most influential dragon in all of Lucidia!

With that boastful declamation, the dragoness stands proudly before you in all her shortstacked glory, giving one of her ornate locks of hair a lazy twirl with an impressive dragon claw as she eyes you up thoughtfully, slowly closing the distance between you with grandiose steps and thrusting out her prominent chest with smug aplomb.
Ask for help with a puzzle.
Apologize for barging into her home.

Your abrupt reversal immediately and plainly is a cold shower on the excited shortstack's passionate eagerness, her tail limply drooping to the floor while she stammers with uncustomary sheepishness.

However, the meek expression promptly disappears as she makes an effort to keep face, levelly clearing her throat while smoothing out her previous breezy demeanor into a more distinguished one, the dragoness aiming a regal stare at you as she expertly brushes any hint of vulnerability off her mien and returns it to a casually playful, domineering one, the atmosphere promptly going back to the initial cat-and-mouse one as she declares.
Well then... If innocent merriment is not what thou cravest, then what is thy desire?

Holding out her hand, the merry shortstack lets you hop onto her palm, then immediately starts off the tour by taking you to a diorama that somehow looks familiar despite you being sure that you've never visited a location quite like it, the ancient-looking slate-gray stone structures and venerably refined adornments not looking like something you'd see on Lucidia... or on Fertilia, for that matter.

Then, as you're brought closer, it dawns on you: this is actually the place where Malicia has been taking you to rest after your erotic doll play! With you having mostly seen it from within, the memory didn't immediately click, but now that you think of it, it turns out that you can identify some furniture you've previously been in close proximity to, including the very comfy bed that Malicia has been tucking you into for sleep.
Seeing understanding light up your face, your giant guide lets out a happy giggle, and proudly informs you as she gestures to the stately model in front of you.
Uhu.~ Yes, [ThePlayerName]. This is indeed what hath been thy haven following our libidinous amusement... But thou shalt also know that more than that, it is mine castle.♪

Or, rather, a {i}wing{/i} of it. Given the diminutive size of these present lodgings of mine, fitting in a whole reproduction of mine home would have been far too cumbersome, even at such a reduced scale...

As she speaks, the musing dragoness leisurely walks across the breadth of the diorama, and you can't but note how despite her words, the miniature construction feels positively {i}sprawling{/i}, especially when beheld at such a small size, the whole of it being easily seven feet in length and more than three feet in height.

And more noticeably, it looks {i}incredibly{/i} detailed and lifelike, each structural arrangement and every piece of furniture looking to have been handmade, and to have furthermore been built from their corresponding materials rather than a toy-like approximation of them, from the elderly granite masonry to the imposing furnishings of mahogany and oak, right down to the robust old-fashioned iron lamps and the heavy drapes of thick wool.

Even though you are nowhere near an expert in model-making, it all appears extremely well-made, possibly to a downright excessive degree, hinting not only at considerable skill, but also at enormous patience, the view of the exquisitely intricate work of art leaving you slack-jawed as you take it all in, to which Malicia reacts with a restrained but tickled pink little laugh.

Impressive, is it not?♪ 'Twas no mean feat to thus evoke a passing resemblance of the sheer majesty of mine abode, but I daresay I did quite a good job of it.~ 'Tis a way not only of practicing one's craft, but also of keeping the memory of one's homeland fresh in one's mind. Lucidia is a long way and a far cry from mine country, after all...

With nostalgia creeping into her voice, the dragoness sports a melancholy look as she scans the somberly colored yet homey-feeling diorama before you, a heartfelt sigh escaping her as she nonetheless turns away from the centerpiece of her handiwork to instead steer your attention to others of her realizations, forcing a bit more cheer into her voice to chase the homesick gloom as she goes on.
But lo, rest assured mine art is not just nostalgia. Prithee, direct thy gaze to this other piece, which should feel more directly familiar.♪
Turning your head, you do as instructed...

... and go through a spell of dizzying confusion as you abruptly find yourself facing one of the hallways of the Forest Dungeon, the unexpected vision leaving you momentarily reeling as you can't but wonder how you got suddenly transported back there without any forewarning!

... Until your brain catches up and you register that you're actually looking at a model once more... And one that is again confoundingly realistic at that, right down to the miniature torches whose glow may or may not be purely magical, and to the minuscule overgrown leaves that may or may not be artificial, the whole reproduction so perfectly complete that you could expect a tiny imp to suddenly spring out of a door and ambush you.

In fact, with the illusion being so engrossing, you almost forget where you are altogether as you lose yourself in the contemplation of the faithful copy, your enraptured stare of appreciative awe once more prompting a satisfied giggle from Malicia behind you.
Uhu.~ Glad to know that mine skills are up to par, judging by thy stunned silence.
In truth, I {i}am{/i} quite proud of it. 'Tis truly the spitting image of Sofia's demesne, including the malleability of it all. Behold!

Demonstrating, she grabs hold of one wall section with her free hand, lifts it up, and places it in another spot before swiftly doing the same with a few other pieces, the repositioned sections neatly fitting together as if they had thus been seamlessly arranged all along, just like some sort of sliding puzzle, the resulting customizability proving indeed quite reminiscent of the way that the Forest Dungeon's design can be altered seemingly at will.
And I've reproduced it {i}all{/i}, down to the smallest detail! Look!

Swiftly, you're ferried to another part of the diorama, this one positively oozing the luxurious, plush grandeur of the resident boss' apartments, the sight of which sends a twinge of enticing trepidation down your spine at the memory of its formidably sensual occupant... Though as you thus inspect it, you can't help but feel like something is missing, and Malicia seems to be of the same mind, as shown by her unsatisfied pout as she sighs behind you.

Ah, but I daresay that for how faithful a mimicry it is, 'tis not the same without that particular succubus perfume of hers pervading the area... But alas, I could never manage to achieve something quite like it... Not to mention that, in any case, 'twould prove quite distracting, if not outright unsafe, to have such a potent {i}scent{/i} floating around mine apartments...

The dragoness gets a distant look in her eyes as she takes you away from your current vista, though you can't be sure whether it's due to her frustration or to the embarrassing memory of unsuccessful past experiments in that vein, your hostess not lingering on the topic as she moves on with the tour.
Alright, just one last item... Do tell me what thou thinkest of {i}this one{/i}.

Once more, you find yourself in familiar territory, this time standing in front of the Will-Power Temple's main doors, which have unsurprisingly been rendered with all the meticulousness and care that are the hallmark of Malicia's work, the exactness of the miniature copy proving all the more impressive given the plethora of details present in the locale's exotic décor, especially at that shrunken size.

However, as you look around and examine more of the tiny temple, you see that the overall layout seems to have somehow been... {i}simplified{/i}... which you would perforce expect at that scale, but even taking that into account, some sections don't look how you remember them, especially the deeper parts of the Power and Will sides, the discrepancy getting a wry grimace out of the prideful artist when you innocently point it out.

Hrmph... So it {i}doth{/i} show... To mine chagrin, I was forced to resort to educated guesses due to the pair of stubborn lugheads in charge of this place refusing to let me into what they called the 'adventurers-only' parts of their domain... Feh, they ought to consider themselves fortunate that Malicia Sinistra is a gracious visitor, else I would have shown them the price of flouting their elder...

And I {i}could{/i} fix those discrepancies now with the help of thine input, but I say {i}nay{/i}. Let these ignominious flaws in mine impeccable masterwork stand as testimonies to their misplaced doggedness, and the unsightly price paid for it!

Tetchily nursing her grudge, the dragoness mumbles irately under her breath as she turns away from the offending diorama with stomping strides, though her sulking wrath is thankfully short-lived, the buxom lady swiftly recomposing herself with a dismissive huff and looking back to you with a milder, more winsome expression as she primly concludes.

{i}Regardless{/i}, this finishes the tour, [ThePlayerName]. Of course, there is {i}much{/i} more that could be shown and said on the subject, but I understand that overexposure to the topic might make it a tedious one for a neophyte, so I shan't ramble... But all the same, I hope thou enjoyedest this taste of the fine art of modeling, courtesy of thine truly.♪
Wrapping up your little entertainment, your hostess returns to your usual cushioned seat, and gently sets you down on it before querying.
And now, shall we pursue our doll play, or leave it at that for now?
Go back to the general doll play options.

The shortstacked lady offers a merry laugh at your positive response, and carefully gives you a little pat with a finger to reward you for your enthusiasm as she fixes you with an ever-ready playful gleam in her eye.
Wondrous.♪ What holds thy fancy, then?

EventText.NameOfScene: Go back to the general doll play options.

theScene: The elegant woman nods at your response, giving you a gentle smile of understanding.
Very well. In that case, let me return thee to thine usual size.

Daintily, the dragoness steps away from you and settles onto her bed, leaving you to grow back to your normal proportions while she fixes you with a questioning stare, waiting to see if you have further business with her.

EventText.NameOfScene: Ask to take a nap in one of her dioramas.
theScene: Your scaled hostess reacts to your request with a small giggle, as if she'd anticipated it, her smiling face radiating tender proprietary fondness as she readily responds.
Feeling tuckered out, art thou? Not a problem.♪ Mine craftsmanship is as pleasing to the touch as it is to the eyes, guaranteeing a most comfortable and restorative nap for tiny tired adventurers.~

Stressing her proud claim with a confident hum, the dragoness makes ready to take you on her hand and carry you to your bedroom destination, but before she does so, something seems to come to her mind and she unxpectedly halts, her expression turning pensive as she thoughtfully looks you over and eventually suggests.

But before that, wouldst thou like to have a bath? ... Not that thou lookest {i}dirty{/i}, but thou couldst always do with washing the city grime and lingering aphrodisiac fumes that pervade Ars Delusia off thy person... And moreover, I personally find that a nice soak always helpeth one feel refreshed and relaxed, thus assisting in making sleep come easier.
I will be as soft and careful as can be, [ThePlayerName]. As thou knowest, mine manual proficiency is beyond question, so I can confidently promise you a thoroughly relaxing, enjoyable experience.♪

The gigantic shortstack looks upon you with doting eagerness, her words gently trailing off and her tail swaying enthusiastically behind her as she awaits your reply, making it clear that if you agree to a bath, you won't be having it on your own.

Looking positively chuffed that she has your agreement, Malicia hums a joyful little tune as she deftly plucks you from your cushioned perch, scooping up your diminutive form in her cupped hands before striding up to her homeland diorama where she gently drops you into a bathroom area before daintily stepping back.
Do wait here just a spell while I get the water. I shan't be long.

Briskly stepping away and out of your sight, your hostess goes to do just that, her momentary absence giving you the time to acquaint yourself with your surroundings, which you can see offer quite the strikingly vivid depiction of what their original inspiration must be like, your model-sized environment having been constructed with all the care, precision, and attention to detail that you know the dragoness for.

You're presently standing on a floor made of somewhat austere but elegant gray ceramic tiles, while the walls and ceiling are made of darker granite. The furniture around you is just as somberly imposing, being crafted out of stately walnut and oak, and featuring currently empty drying racks, ornate shelves laden with doll-sized hygiene and beauty products, and an imposing armoire presumably filled with other bathing amenities.

Most notable of all, however, is the large, pristine-looking marble-white bathtub with honest-to-goddess silver-colored clawed feet... and knowing how all-out its maker tends to go on such things, you definitely wouldn't put it past her to have gone and made the whole piece of bathware out of actual marble and silver, your upcoming ablutions promising to be possibly the most luxurious you've had in your entire existence.

Admittedly, the notion is somewhat strange when you're partaking of such an experience in a doll-sized diorama instead of an actual bathroom, but speak of the devil, Malicia herself doesn't appear to be minding that as she returns bearing a large bowl filled with faintly steaming water, the shortstacked lady certainly looking to be enjoying herself plenty judging by the giddily playful grin on her face.

Letting you step aside, your caretaker brings the receptacle forward and carefully tips its contents into the miniature bathtub, the resulting outpour of hot liquid soon causing a thin fog to spread around the room, the vapory emanation accompanied by a pleasant perfume of tea tree and mint that certainly evokes bathtime, making the atmosphere subtly but meaningfully change from that of a well-made model house to an actual wet room.

Setting the now mostly empty bowl aside, the dragoness daintily tugs up one of her sleeves in order to test the water by dipping her wrist into it, and though you can't help but question the reliability of her scaled skin compared to a more human one, she does appear satisfied by the result, showing a pleased smile as she turns to you.
All nice and ready. And now...

And without further ado, the playfully grinning shortstack eagerly gets her hands on you, operating with ever-confounding dexterity despite those big claws of her as she briskly sets to peeling off your clothes, prompting a flustered start from you at this rather unexpectedly handsy follow-up, your sheepish reaction seemingly only further amusing Malicia who teasingly singsongs.
Come now, [ThePlayerName], there is no cause for being so skittish. Thou art not in the habit of taking thy bath wearing thy garments, art thou?♪

Seeing that the dragoness seems determined to see to your service through and through, and reflecting that you {i}did{/i} commit to being in her care, you resign yourself to your doll-like fate and stop squirming, your accepting docility getting a content titter out of the rather surprisingly forward lady who gently croons in soft praise.

While it is undoubtedly embarrassing to get thus one-sidedly undressed, you also can't deny that there's something indulgently comforting to it, especially on the receiving end of someone as skilled as the nimble-fingered monster girl who promptly has you down to your underwear which she removes just as deftly, punctuating your now total nudity with another bright smile as she cheerfully orders.
Alrighty.♪ Do go ahead and make thyself comfortable, now. It should be right at the ideal temperature.

While she primly folds your clothes and hangs them on one of the nearby racks, you comply and walk up to the bathtub in order to climb into it, part of you fearing that you're in for a scalding as your foot touches the water...

... instead of which you find it pleasantly hot, the promising fragrant warmth easily enticing you to let the rest of your body follow suit, a relaxed sigh floating out of your mouth as you get surrounded up to your neck in the soothing heat and in the accompanying perfume that seems to drape itself all over you like an intangible caress, your demonstrations of happy appreciation eliciting a discreet doting giggle from the onlooking Malicia.

Letting you bask in your toasty ablutions for a moment, she meanwhile opens the bathroom's armoire with a small creak to take a washcloth and towel out of it, hanging the latter onto a rack before she busies herself scanning the filled shelves with a knowing eye, the tip of one of her claws following the line of neatly arrayed pump bottles until she decisively stops at one.

Wetting the washcloth and fitting it on the tip of her index, she then brings it underneath the bottle and presses on the pump with her other hand, coaxing out squirts of gooey gel onto the bathing implement, the resulting controlled spillage already filling the air with a sharp tangy scent in addition to the one your bath water has been infused with, the nature of the aromatic soap promptly elucidated by your hostess who explains.
Lemon-verbena. It shall purify thine epidermis, soothe thy muscles, and make thee feel thoroughly refreshed.

Scooting closer, she gracefully settles on her knees onto a cushion that she seems to have left there across her past sessions of working on her dioramas, the change of posture bringing her upper body more level with you as she instructs.
Now, since thou hath had the time to get a good soak, [ThePlayerName], do get up, and let thy cleaning commence.

Seeing how expectantly she is wielding the washcloth on the tip of her finger, you very much understand that {i}you{/i} are not going to be doing any cleaning... but seeing how enthusiastic she is about continuing to treat you, you don't object and rise to your feet as instructed, once more baring yourself before the dragoness.

Doing so, you note that despite your exposed nudity, her gaze doesn't turn lecherous, but there's certainly something {i}appreciative{/i} to it when she looks you up and down with knowing eyes which stop on your face as she brings her covered finger to it, beginning the washing proper by carefully running the cloth over your skin, the gentle friction quickly building a nice foamy lather and intensifying the soap's invigoratingly sharp citrussy aroma.

Though there's initially something strange and unfamiliar to getting bathed by another person, you find your stiffness gradually loosening under Malicia's skillful ministrations and diligent instructions, the strict lady softly but no-nonsensically directing you to tilt your head, extend your arm, or turn around, the better to leave no spot untended to, making you feel more like a doll than ever as you follow her commands with growing obedience.

Aside from those clipped directives from her, the low lapping of water as you move around, and the continued swishing of the washcloth over your skin, the darkened apartment is silent, slowly lulling you into a state of zen-like relaxation. With nothing in particular to direct your attention to and the warm bathtime soothing your body, your mind goes partly blank, leaving you all the more tranquilly focused on the nice, tension-free here and now.

However, as your ablutions thus proceed, you grow aware of a pleasantly hushed, musical sound which your fuzzy foam-covered senses belatedly identify as humming, your doting dragoness having started to lowly croon a tune that you don't recognize, and which she may not be entirely aware of as she maintains her concentration on your cleaning, her deep purple stare remaining trained on you as she keeps meticulously pampering you.

In this fashion, minutes pass in companionable silence, your assiduous hostess continuing to wash you from head to toe while carrying on with her half-inaudible singing, the two of you leisurely enjoying this sweet little moment until Malicia's task eventually reaches its completion, prompting her to retract her finger while announcing.
All done.♪ Now, close thine eyes, 'tis going to pour for a bit.

Seeing her reach for the previously set-aside bowl, you do as instructed, and soon feel a brief cascade of now tepid water fall all over your head and shoulders to stream down the rest of your body, carrying the accumulated foam in its wake and leaving you squeaky clean... but also starting to feel a bit uncomfortably cold, your skin beginning to bristle with goosebumps as the chill of the water exposed to the ambient air spreads all over you.

Thankfully, the sensation is short-lived as Malicia quickly reaches for the racks and picks up the large, thick towel that she wraps you into, allowing herself a moment of playfulness as she takes advantage of scrubbing you dry to cover your face with the bath sheet and muss your hair while she's at it, her face a tableau of giggling amusement when you reflexively pull the piece of cloth away from your eyes and somewhat blearily stare at her.
Uhuhu.~ Mine apologies, [ThePlayerName]. Thou lookedest so precious, standing there like an idle poppet, that I could not help but tease thee a bit.♪
But tomfoolery aside, thy wash is complete. Thou mayest now step out, redress thyself, and adjourn to thy bed. Do not worry about the cleanup, I shall take care of it while thou slumberest.

Feeling nicely toasty and relaxed after that hygienic interlude, you do just as you're told, putting your clothes back on under Malicia's doting gaze, then walking across her diorama house under her guidance, right up to the familiar bedroom where she helpfully lifts the covers from your usual bed to let you climb into it.

With you having already been feeling like having a nap to begin with, and with the comfortable assisted bathtime having further soothed your body and mind, you can't manage to stifle a yawn as your gracious caretaker tucks you in, your demonstration of snug sleepiness eliciting another fond titter from her.

Without insisting, the dragoness simply presents her hand for you to climb on, then takes you across her living room up to her home diorama where she lets you alight into the familiar main bedroom before delicately taking hold of the large bed's sheets with daintily pinched fingers, partly pulling off the covers before nodding at the open spot.

The unquestionable comfort of the bed making it easy to answer that invitation, you eagerly climb into the princely piece of miniature furniture, letting out a sigh of relaxation and already feeling your eyes droop restfully as Malicia gently tucks you in, the sight of your snugly ensconced form getting a little doting giggle out of her.

Softly, she reaches for you to carefully stroke your head with the tip of her fingers, the feather-light caress despite her formidable-looking claws further lulling you into a pleasant doze, leaving you indulgently sinking into the plump mattress and cozily huddling into the fluffy covers, much to the happy approval of your hostess who tenderly coos.
Uhu.~ Seeing thee thusly luxuriate in languid leisure, one might feel tempted to join thee.♥︎
But I shan't disturb thy rest. Simply be assured that thou canst slumber peacefully, without fear of any disturbance.

With those reassuring words smoothly sending you deeper into a drowsy torpor, you let your eyelids fall shut on their own, the darkness of Malicia's house seeming to deepen and thicken as your senses quickly dull into blissful unconsciousness, as if the resident shadows were congregating around you and embracing you, watching over you in your sleep.

After what must have been a few hours of shuteye, you stir with your recumbent frame still snugly weighed down by the thick, warm quilt, the homely comfort of it all enticing you into staying there in slowly emerging wakefulness for just a few more minutes...

Until you're roused for good by the light tinkling of metal against porcelain as Malicia passes you by teacup in hand, a glance in your direction apprising her of your waking state which she takes in with an amused smile.
Ah, there the adventurer returneth. And here I was wondering if I would have to forcibly rouse thee, lest thou continuest sleeping for untold eons like some manner of slumbering beast.

Teasing jab aside, her smile is a sight for sore eyes as she sets her cup down before walking up to you, her looming presence reminding you once more of your present size difference as her face fills up the near entirety of your field of view, the vision nevertheless not as intimidating as it might once have been as she gives your freshly awake form a quick glance before conversationally offering.
If thou art ready to be out and about, thou mayest rise, and we may continue our audience.

Feeling suitably rested by your nap, you acquiesce to that, and slip out of bed to get onto her offered hand, upon which the dragoness carries you back to your habitual cushioned spot where she lets you settle yourself, the elegant shortstack then stepping back to fix you with a questioning gaze as she asks.
With that one need of thine taken care of, is there more thou wishest to partake of, or will that be it for the time being?

EventText.NameOfScene: Presentation of Malicia's arts and crafts.
theScene: Your demonstration of curiosity instantly puts a large grin on Malicia's face, the dragoness looking most pleased that you're expressing interest in her handiwork, and making no secret of her pride in the matter as she cheerily responds.
Uhuhu.~ I take it mine creations have caught thine attention and led thee to wonder about the process of their shaping? How I understand thee.

After all, I {i}am{/i} one of the best miniature craftsmen in the entire world, if not {i}the{/i} best, and it speaks well of thine own aesthetic sense that thine eye and mind thusly responded to the allure of mine superior artisanship with tasteful inquisitiveness.♪

That definitely feels like reading a {i}bit{/i} much into your request, but given how into the subject your hostess plainly is, you reflect that it wouldn't do to deflate her enthusiasm... Not that you're given much of an opportunity to interject anyway, the giddy shortstack immediately following up on her bombastic speech by deftly scooping you up into her palm, then marching towards one of her curio-laden tables with purposeful alacrity.

However, as you approach the imposing piece of furniture, you realize that it's not actually a table, but a dresser featuring countless small drawers and boasting an altogether {i}massive{/i} size, the squat wooden mass standing easily as tall as Malicia and stretching twice as large, the scale of it all making you wonder how the aforementioned owner of the modest apartment was even able to make it fit through the doorway.

But you don't get to ponder that mystery for long, a sudden lurch jolting you out of your thoughts as your carrier energetically hops onto a tall stool facing the chest of drawers, exposing you to a new and equally overwhelming sight.

It appears that in addition to being used for storage, the dresser doubles as a workbench, its top strewn with bits of cloth, pieces of wood, scattered gemstones, and fragments of rock, in addition to blades, needles, scissors, hammers, brushes, and more that your untrained mind simply can't wrap itself around, many of the tools looking like the kind of equipment you'd only find in specialized stores, or would even need to get made bespoke.

And not only can you barely understand what a lot of this stuff is for, but you also can't make sense of any manner of organization, the whole of it looking like a hurricane blew through a hardware store for tiny people, resulting in a messy bric-a-brac of countless seemingly half-finished projects, the spectacle of which nevertheless doesn't seem to be a matter of any shame for your hostess who nonchalantly declares.
Pray do not mind the untidiness. As thou canst see, I am always working on several projects at the same time.~

'Untidiness' seems like an understatement for that kind of clutter, but you once more politely refrain from commenting on the subject as Malicia lets you get off her palm and explore her handiwork more directly, giving you the impression of stepping into a doll-sized warehouse as you all at once find yourself surrounded by incomplete rooms, half-built furniture, partly stitched draperies, and a host of other more or less recognizable items.

Bizarreness and messiness aside, you have to admit that it {i}is{/i} interesting to get a peek at the making of the dragoness' dioramas from up close, the in-progress creations giving you a sense of how much skill they must all take in carpentry, rock-cutting, sewing, and other fields of artisanship that probably elude you, the modelmaker herself happily basking in your attention and readily chiming back in with a proud expression on her face.
Ahu.~ Impressed, art thou not?♪ Not to toot mine own horn, but I am indeed quite the dab hand at many crafts... And suitably provisioned, too!

And with that, she enthusiastically opens some of the dresser's many drawers to show you the materials she uses, presenting for your perusal bolts of cloth, several varieties of wood, sheets of various metals, paints of all sorts, and everything else she might require to build her miniature worlds, the massive storage unit truly containing a factory's worth of doll-scaled components.

The supplies even include the tiniest jewels you've ever seen, each no larger than a grain of sand, making you wonder how Malicia can work at that scale... and also how she keeps track of where all this stuff is, the cheerful shortstack never skipping a beat as she goes through one drawer after another, seemingly having all of their contents perfectly memorized.

However, after a spell of more lively demonstrating and animated gushing on her part, you notice that her expression seems to turn pensive as her attention goes from her work utensils back to you, her amethyst eyes looking you up and down with an intensity that clearly hints at her having something in mind, which she eventually voices after a moment of thought.

Mmmh, as thou mayest have guessed, despite mine penchant for diorama-making, I am not in the habit of working on accessories for dolls proper... But I must confess that, in that exact moment, having one such doll just in front of me is invigoratingly stirring mine creativity.

So what do you say I practice mine talents on thee, [ThePlayerName]? I daresay that in but a few minutes, I could make thee an outfit the likes of which thou wouldst not soon find in any run-of-the-mill store.♪

Though in the spirit of honesty, and for the sake of tempering thine expectations, I shall mention that although mine magic shall enable thee to continue wearing such a garment even at thy regular size, thou shouldst not expect it to be of great potency. 'Twill be a piece of haute couture, after all, not an enchanted artifact.

With that caveat mentioned, the dragoness awaits your response, her hands elegantly and restfully folded in her lap as she peers at you from atop her stool, looking to already be running possible designs and cuts through her mind.
Pity... But I shan't press the matter.

And true to her word, she leaves that avenue of thought aside and promptly goes back to the presentation of her handiwork, happily killing time by nattering away about some of her projects past, present, and future, the dainty monster girl certainly having a passion for her craft that she's not shy about sharing.

Time thus passes with Malicia continuing to run you through her treasured hobby and its material particulars, the resulting idle conversation proving companionably pleasant owing to your hostess being quite agreeably loquacious and eloquently demonstrative on the subject.

Still, it must be said that between her usual antiquated parlance and all the specialized terms she keeps throwing at you, most of what she's saying goes over your head, the old-fashioned lady definitely not being used to making her interests attainable to all comers, nor is she displaying any care to do so, seeming to be of her usual 'either you get it or you don't' persuasion.

But ultimately, after educating you at length on the intricacies of miniature brickwork and the most recommended adhesive depending on the stone used, she seems to notice how much time has passed as she happens to glance at the outside world's light barely peeking through her windows, upon which she lets out a demure cough as she thus realizes she's gotten {i}somewhat{/i} carried away, looking away in slight shyness as she volunteers.

{i}A-Ahem...{/i} While I am {i}certain{/i} thou art properly enraptured by our present topic and wouldst be more than eager to learn more, I shall be the voice of reason and caution that one shouldn't have too much of a good thing... Better thus to leave it at that, and proceed otherwise with our amus- our {i}audience{/i}.

And so saying, she swiftly picks you up from her dresser with something of a fluster, and takes you back to your initial seat where she gently sets you down before primly recomposing herself, idly smoothing out her revealing outfit and readjusting her swirling coiffure before training a gaze returned to its usual amethyst coolness back on you.
And on that note... Dost thou wish to carry on with our doll play, or hast thou had enough for now?

Swiftly, in a flurry of precise rapid motions that one wouldn't expect from someone with such a voluptuously shortstacked figure, she deftly pushes aside some of her in-progress projects to make room for your fitting session, all at once making you feel like you've been put on a stage with a spotlight trained on you as she brightly smiles down at you and giddily announces.
Then let us commence without delay!♪ Pray, do not move, [ThePlayerName], and do not worry: I have the hands of a surgeon.

And with those confident words, she grabs a roll of measuring tape and eagerly sets to taking your measurements, wrapping the oversized cloth length around your chest then sliding a well-loved notepad towards herself to quickly jot down the resulting numbers, before briskly carrying on by instructing.
Now, extend thine arms, please. Form a T.

In this fashion, she takes and records the sizes of your arms, waist, legs, feet, hands, and even your head 'for the sake of completeness', her playful expression soon fading away from her face and switching to one of careful concentration as she swaps to work mode, giving way to a downright solemn silence only broken by her directions, her pencil's fast scratching, and an occasional half-indistinct mutter from her as she thinks aloud.
